summary: Profile Setup flow fully verified end-to-end. Backend POST /api/auth/profile correctly accepts and persists {name, avatar (base64 data URI), about}; GET /api/auth/me returns the persisted values. Frontend route /(auth)/profile-setup renders all required testIDs (back, name, about, avatar-pick, save, 6 status presets); name input toggles save-button disabled state; about input enforces 139-char maxLength; preset chips update the status field; tapping Continue saves and navigates to /(tabs)/mail. No deprecated Expo packages detected in this screen (uses expo-image-picker with new array mediaTypes syntax). Note: expo logs show 'shadow* style props deprecated' and 'props.pointerEvents deprecated' warnings, but these come from React Native Web compat layer in other screens, not this profile-setup component.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py:339 update_profile uses `req.about or user.get('about')` — sending an empty string for about will NOT clear it (falls back to existing). Acceptable for current UX, but if a user wants to clear status, they cannot via this endpoint. Consider distinguishing None (no change) vs '' (clear).

profile-setup.tsx:61 sends `about: about.trim() || undefined`, which intentionally omits the field when empty — pairs with the backend behavior above, so net effect is 'cannot clear status to empty'. Not a blocker.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded user peter@w.xyz. Test mutates Peter's name/avatar/about; final state after test_profile_clear_avatar: name='Peter Williams', avatar=null, about='Busy'. Frontend playwright run set about back to 'Available'. Other tests do not depend on these exact values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_profile_setup.py is reusable for regression. It logs in Peter, hits /api/auth/profile + /api/auth/me, and verifies persistence of name/avatar(base64)/about including 139-char content. If you need to verify the 'cannot clear about with empty string' behavior, send {about: ''} — backend will keep prior value due to `req.about or user.get('about')` short-circuit.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found; this was a verification request.
